untranslatable_reason: This signal requires DeMark Sequential pattern recognition (buy setup vs sell setup price comparison and reverse signal detection) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. The entry condition depends on identifying the 'furthest price of the previous sell setup' and comparing it to a 'buy setup' — both of which are pattern-based constructs requiring multi-bar sequential analysis not available in the indicator list. Stop-loss calculation requires identifying the 'lowest range day' within combined setup and countdown periods, which also requires sequential pattern recognition not available in standard indicators.
translation_notes: DeMark Sequential is a proprietary pattern recognition system that requires custom bars and multi-bar pattern state tracking. The indicators provided (RSI, ATR, Moving Averages, etc.) cannot replicate the sequential counting logic. To implement this signal, a custom indicator calculating DeMark setups, countdowns, and price perfection points would be required.
